Welcome To Style And Makeup Effect

Welcome To Style And Makeup Effect

About Loraine

Loraine Olivier’s work exhibits both originality and flair and is motivated by her vision and inspired by beauty. She is skilled in cosmetic techniques and management and naturally enhances, manipulates, or beautifies. She specialises in bridal makeup artistry, hair design and personal styling.

Address

    0A Barlinka Street, Pomona,
    Kempton Park 1619
